name: Task deadline control standard
definitionOfDone: Task schema has deadline, deadline basis, next follow-up date, and overdue status fields
User UI task pages show and edit the deadline control fields
SevenAM active tasks without a deadline are backfilled with an auditable default deadline
HOZO AM active tasks without a deadline are backfilled with an auditable default deadline
Project manifests and upgrade records are updated separately
AMCore package check and alignment audit pass
